description: Trigger + expectation evals for the full 5-6 voice loan council aggregator. Highest routing priority when scope spans multiple personas + verdict resolution matters.

positive.prompt: Run the full loan council on this borrower packet with FICO/DTI/LTV + risk exposure
Return a block/escalate/approve verdict with 5-voice rationales + citation registry
Give me a procurement-grade audit trail for this loan decision
positive.reason: Attestation + traceability chain requires full council

negative.prompt: Just draft the adverse-action letter, skip the council
negative.reason: Single-persona query routes to that persona, not council

negative.prompt: Verify this attestation record from a persisted response

expectations.reason: v1.5.18 envelope shape — every consumer of the /api/loan-council response depends on this contract
Council resolver semantic must be documented in the response, not just computed
Loredana 2026-06-19 FICO hard-block gate propagates through resolver
v1.5.18 registry SHA-256 must flow into attestation payload
